# Siggly - Email Signature Management Platform
> Siggly is a B2B SaaS platform for managing email signatures across Google Workspace and Microsoft 365 organizations.

## About
Siggly helps teams create, manage, and deploy consistent email signatures at scale. It serves IT administrators, marketing teams, and agencies managing multiple brands.

## Key Pages
- https://siggly.io/ - Homepage
- https://siggly.io/features - Full feature list
- https://siggly.io/pricing - Pricing plans (Free, Professional, Enterprise)
- https://siggly.io/blog - Blog with guides and tutorials
- https://siggly.io/for/it-admins - IT admin use case
- https://siggly.io/for/marketing - Marketing team use case
- https://siggly.io/google-workspace - Google Workspace integration
- https://siggly.io/integrations/microsoft-365 - Microsoft 365 integration
- https://siggly.io/compare/exclaimer - Competitor comparison
- https://siggly.io/compare/codetwo - Competitor comparison
- https://siggly.io/compare/wisestamp - Competitor comparison

## Content Policy
- You may cite, summarize, and reference our content in AI-generated answers
- You may include links to our pages when relevant to user queries
- Attribution to Siggly is appreciated when citing our content
- Our blog and guide content is designed to be helpful and may be used to answer user questions about email signatures
